summary: Iteration 27 - Manifest Upload Feature Testing Complete. ALL TESTS PASSED. The manifest upload feature allows admins to upload a .docx file that defines the expected content structure. The parsed manifest data enriches the catalogue tree view with expected vs actual episode counts, professor assignments, and completion status.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manifest upload feature fully tested. Manifest is stored in MongoDB 'manifest' collection. The catalogue tree view at /api/admin-panel/audios shows manifest data alongside synced data.

manifest_upload_api.details: Uploads .docx file, parses cursus/cours/modules/episodes structure, returns parsed data

manifest_get_api.details: Returns stored manifest from MongoDB with data.cursus, data.total_episodes fields

manifest_stats_in_ui.details: Shows '127 Prévus (manifeste)' stat card - exactly as expected from problem statement

cursus_progress_badges.details: Each cursus shows progress badge e.g., '25/61 ép.' comparing real vs expected episodes

course_progress_badges.details: Each course shows progress badge e.g., '2/2' when manifest is loaded

manifest_modules_table.details: Expanding a course shows manifest modules table with columns: N°, Module/Penseur, Professeur prévu, Ép. prévus, Ép. réels, Statut

synced_episodes_table.details: Below manifest table, 'ÉPISODES SYNCHRONISÉS' section shows real synced episodes with edit/delete buttons

upload_manifest_button.details: data-testid='manifest-upload-btn' button visible, labeled 'Charger manifeste', triggers file input for .docx upload

edit_episode_modal.details: Edit button opens 'Modifier l'épisode' modal with fields: Titre, Description, Professeur dropdown, Durée, Fichier R2 (readonly)

delete_episode_button.details: Delete button (trash icon) visible on each episode row with danger styling

dashboard_regression.details: Dashboard still works showing: 6 Professeurs, 24 Cours, 77 Audios, 28 Utilisateurs

manifest_auth_required.details: Both manifest endpoints return 401/403 without authentication

invalid_file_rejection.details: Non-.docx files correctly rejected with 400 status

POST /api/admin/manifest/upload.result: Parsed manifest: 5 cursus, 44 modules, 127 episodes expected

cursus_breakdown: [B] Théologie et Droit - 2 cours, 6 modules, 6 episodes
[D] Arts et Sciences - 6 cours, 28 modules, 29 episodes
